description: Style noteA wallet is a subtle style essential, and every cosmopolitan man who knows the sartorial rights and wrongs needs a wallet like this one! This peter england wallet, with it stylish upper and practical, functional inner is an accessory must-have!Product DetailsTwo main compartmentsTwo slip pockets on either sideFour credit card slots with a flap over and a transparent id card slot on the leftZipped pocket on the right for coins with two card slots belowBranding embossed on the frontMaterial and Care100% leatherRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtSizeDimensions: 11 cm x 9 cm
